title: DoubleLife
description: Based on Grian's SMP series DoubleLife. Link your health with another player and compete to win!
body:
Immerse yourself in your own version of the brand new DoubleLife SMP with this plugin! Every player on the server will be randomly linked with another, joining their health bar into one and tasking them to be the last team standing. Each team is granted three lives, and teams with one life remaining turn hostile, attacking the remaining players. Can you beat the rest of your friends and win? Download the plugin to find out!

Features:
- New GameMode outlined above
- Colored names based on life count
- Life count recited to player on every death
- Can be customized to fit your server better
- Custom parings with whomever you choose
- Options to share the hunger and potion effects between the two players
- Toggleable DoubleLife TNT recipe
- Custom life counts

Notice:
Do not delete any file created in your world folder with the extension ".doublelife". This file holds information on who are pairs, their current health level, and how many lives are remaining

Also, please ensure you have an even number of players online when you start. You can't make pairs if there is an odd number and the plugin won't run

Commands: (All are only for OP)
```
/doublelife start # Starts the match
/doublelife stop # Stops the life linking (can be resumed later)
/doublelife restart # Reruns the start command to reset lives and re-randomize soulmates
/doublelife freeze # Freezes players, mobs, and time
/doublelife refresh # Scans for new players and adds them to the game
/doublelife settings # Opens the settings menu outlined below
- Book: Toggles between showing the players their soulmate
- Goat Horn: Toggles between listing all soulmates in chat
- Enchanting Table: Toggles between allowing players to craft enchanting tables (This is for used if the server admin is going to place one enchantment table down for everyone)
- Nether Star: Allows the user to change the number of starting lives each team has, along with disabling lives all together
- Totem of Undying: Has a UI that lets you decide who is paired with who. (Players without set pairs will be randomly picked)```
